academic.qualification: 10+2 (Higher Secondary) or equivalent, or 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics as a compulsory subject.
academic.diploma_alternative: 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics as a compulsory subject and minimum 45% aggregate is also accepted.

aptitude.nata_minimum: Best NATA score is considered per COA rules. Valid NATA 2025 / NATA 2026 scores accepted (subject to COA conditions).
notes: An aptitude test in architecture is mandatory; admission without NATA or JEE Paper-2 is not allowed.
If you have both NATA and JEE Paper-2 scores, the higher one is used in the merit calculation.
Holders of valid NATA 2025 score who did not take admission in 2025-26 can use that score (per COA conditions).

nativity_rules.title: Studied 8th to 12th in Tamil Nadu
nativity_rules.description: Tamil Nadu candidates who passed VIII, IX, X, XI, XII from schools located in Tamil Nadu. No nativity certificate required.

nativity_rules.title: Tamil Nadu native, studied outside
nativity_rules.description: Tamil Nadu native candidates who studied any of VIII to XII outside Tamil Nadu. Must produce nativity certificate in electronic / digitally signed e-Certificate form from the Government of Tamil Nadu.

nativity_rules.title: Children of Central Government employees
nativity_rules.description: Eligible irrespective of nativity, provided parents/guardians have served in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years. Employer certificate required. Considered under Open Competition.

nativity_rules.title: Children of PSU / Government-recognised institution employees
nativity_rules.description: Parents must be permanently employed in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years (PF slips, IT returns as evidence). Considered under Open Competition.

nativity_rules.title: Sons/daughters of All India Service Tamil Nadu cadre officers
nativity_rules.description: Eligible to apply with a self-declaration from the parent. Considered under Open Competition.

nativity_rules.title: Other state candidates who studied 8th to 12th in Tamil Nadu
nativity_rules.description: Eligible without nativity certificate. Considered under Open Competition.

nativity_rules.title: Sri Lankan Tamil Refugee
nativity_rules.description: Considered under Open Competition. Identification certificate from Headquarters Tahsildar (or passport + visa + police-station letter for non-camp registered).

nativity_rules.title: OCI / PIO cardholders
nativity_rules.description: Native of Tamil Nadu OCI/PIO cardholders are eligible under Open Category from 2023-24 onwards. Not applicable to OCI/PIO born in a foreign country after 04.03.2021.

tiebreaker: Aggregate marks in Higher Secondary / Diploma (higher is better)
Date of birth (elder candidate gets preference)
Random number assigned at registration (preference to the larger number)
